Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Ike Akowuosa.
Attorney, Francisco Torres, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Charles Stoudamire, is present.
Attorney, Melvin Belli , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of NOV-08-2010 remains on calendar.
